title: Yowin Solar Garden Lights 2 Pack 75 LED Large Christmas Outdoor Decorations, 8 Modes Metal Christmas Star Pathway Lights IP65 Waterproof Solar Garden Stake for Xmas Path Gifts Ornaments Decorations
features: Create Magical Outdoor Christmas Decorations - Experience the magic of Christmas with our large, sparkling 30cm Solar Stars. Easily decorate your garden, patio, or balcony and create a welcoming, festive atmosphere without annoying cables or constant battery changes.

75 LED Christmas Lights Outdoor & 8 Modes - Choose from 8 different lighting modes – from gentle constant light to festive flashing. The 75 LEDs in the robust metal construction spread a warm and inviting light that draws every eye.

Simple Solar Powered – Automatically Beautiful - The star charges itself with sunlight during the day and automatically lights up your outdoor area for 6-8 hours in the evening. Enjoy cosy Christmas evenings completely without electricity costs and manual switching on and off.

Especially Robust for Winter - Don't worry about rain or snow! Our Christmas star is completely waterproof with IP65 and withstands all weather conditions. So your Christmas decoration stays beautiful all season long.

The Perfect Christmas Greeting - Everything included: You receive 2 Christmas decoration stars for an even greater effect. The ideal gift for everyone who wants to turn their home into a Christmas winter wonderland.
description: Product Description Yown 2 Pack Solar Christmas Star Lights Auto On/Off Star Solar Garden Lights With the integrated photocell sensor to detect light, outside christmas lights solar will be automatically on at dusk and off at dawn, lit up your garden lovely at this christmas 8 Lighting Modes Solar powered star lights has 8 lighting modes including blinking, flashing and chasing, these star-shaped path lights work really well for sprucing up the garden or walkway during the festive season IP65 Waterproof Star path lights is crafted from metal and stainless steel materials, with copper wire lights evenly wound around a star measuring 30cm in size. The IP65 waterproof design ensures star stake path Lights can operate normally outdoors in rain or snow Star-shaped Stake Lights Christmas star path finder stake Lights can be applied to decorate your outdoor, yard, lawn, pathway, walkway, driveway, and Christmas holiday .Discover the joy of creating a warm and inviting atmosphere that captures the enchantment of Christmas Previous page Solar Pathway Lights Solar Garden Lights Solar Christmas Lights Next page What are the dimensions of the xmas garden lights? The height of the star solar lights is 70 centimetres, and the 30-centimetre star features 75 warm white LEDs. How long can the garden solar lights light up? 8 hours charge in full sunlight the garden solar star garden lights can light duration up to 6-8 hours. (The luminosity of solar articles depends on the duration of daylight and the intensity) Is it waterproof? Can it be used outdoors? Solar Christmas Star is IP65 waterproof, meaning it can be used normally in rainy or snowy weather, though its operating time may be reduced
